sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27439" key="di/dis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δί-δις</orth>, inseparable Suffix, signifying motion to a place, <sense id="n27439.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-δε</ref></xr>, but only used in a few words, as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄλλυδις, οἴκαδις, χαμάδις.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
